description: Expected time at which the earnings announcement will occur, typically in HHMM format or as a session code (e.g., BMO, AMC)
Number of trading days until the next scheduled earnings report date
Scheduled time for the next earnings report (in HHMM or session code)
Number of trading days elapsed since the previous earnings report date (always non-positive)
Scheduled or actual event time of the previous earnings report (in HHMM or session code)
